name: Inhibrx Biosciences, Inc.
business: Inhibrx Biosciences, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel biologic therapeutic candidates, including ozekibart (INBRX-109) and INBRX-106, for oncology indications using its proprietary modular protein engineering platforms. The company has not generated any revenue from product sales and relies on third parties for clinical trials and manufacturing.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company with a pipeline of novel biologic therapeutic candidates, developed using our proprietary modular protein engineering platforms.

catalysts.event: BLA submission for ozekibart in chondrosarcoma
catalysts.sentence: Following recent regulatory interactions, we plan to submit a biologics license application early in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Update on ozekibart colorectal cancer expansion cohort
catalysts.sentence: We plan to provide an update on the expansion cohort during the second quarter of 2026 when the PFS data is mature.

catalysts.event: Enrollment completion for ozekibart Ewing sarcoma trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete enrollment in the Phase 1/2 trial of ozekibart in combination with IRI/TMZ for advanced or metastatic, unresectable, relapsed, or refractory Ewing sarcoma in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA meeting for potential accelerated approval of ozekibart in colorectal cancer or Ewing sarcoma
catalysts.sentence: If the current response and duration trends observed continue, we plan to meet with the FDA in the second half of 2026 to discuss an accelerated approval pathway for this indication.

catalysts.event: Initial results from INBRX-106 Phase 2 HNSCC trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to provide initial results from the Phase 2 trial in the second quarter of 2026.
